# Let's load the file to inspect content
path = "/mnt/data/file-QybPCupFqHsLtcEBM4rsbD-text_to_analyse.txt"
with open(path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    s = f.read()
len(s), s[:1000]
print(s[:2000])

text = s
# ayah
aya = "أَيُحِبُّ أَحَدُكُمْ أَنْ يَأْكُلَ لَحْمَ أَخِيهِ مَيْتًا فَكَرِهْتُمُوهُ وَاتَّقُوا اللَّهَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ تَوَّابٌ رَحِيمٌ"
start_aya = text.find(aya)
start_aya, text[start_aya-20:start_aya+len(aya)+20]

start_h = s.find("أتدرون ما الغيبة؟")
start_h, s[start_h-40:start_h+100]

end_h = s.find("بهتّه", start_h)
end_h
candidate = s[start_h:end_h+len("بهتّه")]
candidate
repr(candidate[-20:]), repr(candidate[:200])
start_h, end_h, end_h+len("بهتّه"), s[start_h:end_h+len("بهتّه")]

# find all occurrences of ayah string
indices = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = s.find(aya, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    indices.append(idx)
    start = idx+1
indices

hadith_frag = "أتدرون ما الغيبة؟"
indices_h = []
start = 0
while True:
    idx = s.find(hadith_frag, start)
    if idx == -1:
        break
    indices_h.append(idx)
    start = idx+1
indices_h

phrase1 = "أتدرون ما الغيبة؟"
phrase2 = "هي ذكرك أخاك بما يكره"
phrase3 = "أفرأيت لو كان في أخيك ما تقول؟"
occ2 = []
start = 0
while True:
    i = s.find(phrase2, start)
    if i == -1: break
    occ2.append(i)
    start = i+1
occ2

def find_all(pat):
    idxs = []
    st = 0
    while True:
        i = s.find(pat, st)
        if i==-1: break
        idxs.append(i)
        st = i+1
    return idxs

find_all("أفرأيت لو كان في أخيك ما تقول؟")
find_all("إن كان فيه ما تقول فقد اغتبته")
find_all("وإن لم يكن فيه ما تقول فقد بهتّه")

# helper: get all start indices for a phrase, including punctuation
def all_occurrences(phrase):
    idxs = []
    st = 0
    while True:
        i = s.find(phrase, st)
        if i == -1:
            break
        idxs.append(i)
        st = i+1
    return idxs

phrases = {
    "أتدرون ما الغيبة؟": [],
    "هي ذكرك أخاك بما يكره": [],
    "أفرأيت لو كان في أخيك ما تقول؟": [],
    "إن كان فيه ما تقول فقد اغتبته": [],
    "وإن لم يكن فيه ما تقول فقد بهتّه": []
}
for k in phrases:
    phrases[k] = all_occurrences(k)
phrases

start2 = 2407
end2 = start2 + len(aya)
start2, end2, s[start2:end2]

# Build final spans data
spans_final = []

# Ayah spans
spans_final.append({"span_start":124, "span_end":247, "span_text": s[124:247], "citation_type":"Aya"})
spans_final.append({"span_start":2407, "span_end":2530, "span_text": s[2407:2530], "citation_type":"Aya"})

# Hadith spans: create in sorted order by start
hadith_entries = []
for phr, idxs in hadith_phrases.items():
    for idx in idxs:
        hadith_entries.append((idx, idx+len(phr), phr))
hadith_entries = sorted(hadith_entries, key=lambda x: x[0])
for st, en, phr in hadith_entries:
    spans_final.append({"span_start": st, "span_end": en, "span_text": phr, "citation_type": "Hadith"})

# Validate order by span_start
spans_final_sorted = sorted(spans_final, key=lambda d: d['span_start'])
# Print sizes
len(spans_final_sorted)

for sp in spans_final_sorted:
    print(sp)
